% Auto-generated PGFPlots figure for trajectory_colormap
% Requires: \usepackage{pgfplots,pgfplotstable,xcolor}
% Optional: \usepgfplotslibrary{groupplots}
\providecommand{\postprocessfigurewidth}{\linewidth}
\pgfplotsset{compat=1.18}
\definecolor{CentralMassiveMimoColor}{HTML}{D4A017}
\definecolor{DistributedFixedColor}{HTML}{2F5D8A}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableColor}{HTML}{CB3A2A}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \begin{axis}[
    width=\postprocessfigurewidth,
    height=0.72\postprocessfigurewidth,
    xlabel={x [m]},
    ylabel={y [m]},
    axis equal image,
    grid=major,
    colorbar,
    point meta min=0,
  ]
    \addplot[scatter, only marks, mark=*, mark size=1.7pt, scatter src=explicit] table[x=x_m,y=y_m,meta=time_s,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/trajectory_colormap_points.csv};
  \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
